title: Jamaican Cheese Bowl
description: A flavorful and comforting bowl filled with sautéed Jamaican spices and melted cheese, perfect for a cozy night in.
instructions: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
In a large pan, sauté the onions until they're translucent and fragrant.
Add the Jamaican seasoning to the pan and stir well.
Combine the cooked rice and sautéed onions in a large serving bowl.
Top the rice mixture with shredded cheese.
Place the bowl under the broiler until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
